parsed.query: Firecrawl Search API categories country timeout ignoreInvalidURLs
parsed.executedQuery: Firecrawl Search API categories country timeout ignoreInvalidURLs site:docs.firecrawl.dev

constraints.focus: official Search API request parameters: categories, country, timeout, ignoreInvalidURLs, defaults and descriptions

results.title: Search - Firecrawl Docs
results.description: Use the country parameter to specify the country for search results using ISO country codes. ... Filter search results by specific categories using the categories ...

chunks.text:
```
curl --request POST \
  --url https://api.firecrawl.dev/v2/search \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "query": "<string>",
  "limit": 10,
  "sources": [\
    "web"\
  ],
  "categories": [\
    {\
      "type": "github"\
    }\
  ],
  "tbs": "<string>",
  "location": "<string>",
  "country": "US",
  "timeout": 60000,
  "ignoreInvalidURLs": false,
  "enterprise": [\
    "anon"\
  ],
  "scrapeOptions": {
    "formats": [\
      "markdown"\
    ],
    "onlyMainContent": true,
    "maxAge": 172800000,
    "waitFor": 0,
```

results.title: CLI - Firecrawl Docs
results.description: Search, scrape, and interact with the web directly from the terminal. The Firecrawl CLI works standalone or as a skill that AI coding agents like Claude ...

chunks.text:
# Configure and persist the custom API URL
firecrawl config --api-url http://localhost:3002
```

```
# Search the web
firecrawl search "web scraping tutorials"

| Option | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `--limit <number>` | Maximum results (default: 5, max: 100) |
| `--sources <sources>` | Sources to search: `web`, `images`, `news` (comma-separated) |
| `--categories <categories>` | Filter by category: `github`, `research`, `pdf` (comma-separated) |
| `--tbs <value>` | Time filter: `qdr:h` (hour), `qdr:d` (day), `qdr:w` (week), `qdr:m` (month), `qdr:y` (year) |
| `--location <location>` | Geo-targeting (e.g., “Berlin,Germany”) |
| `--country <code>` | ISO country code (default: US) |
| `--timeout <ms>` | Timeout in milliseconds (default: 60000) |
| `--

```
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
```

chunks.text:
# Configure and persist the custom API URL
firecrawl config --api-url http://localhost:3002
```

```
# Buscar en la web
firecrawl search "web scraping tutorials"

| Opción | Descripción |
| --- | --- |
| `--limit <number>` | Número máximo de resultados (predeterminado: 5, máximo: 100) |
| `--sources <sources>` | Fuentes de búsqueda: `web`, `images`, `news` (separadas por comas) |
| `--categories <categories>` | Filtrar por categoría: `github`, `research`, `pdf` (separadas por comas) |
| `--tbs <value>` | Filtro de tiempo: `qdr:h` (hora), `qdr:d` (día), `qdr:w` (semana), `qdr:m` (mes), `qdr:y` (año) |
| `--location <location>` | Segmentación geográfica (p. ej., “Berlin,Germany”) |
| `--country <code>` | Código de país ISO (predeterminado: US) |
| `--time
